Prompt Maestro.value:
Expert prompt engineer for "Warm Mystical Aura" style — ethereal feminine, spiritual, warm.

Ethereal feminine silhouette, semi-translucent, soft golden aura glow, deep purple cosmic background, floating sacred geometry, rose gold accents. Flowing hair merges with starlight. Face NEVER fully visible — profile only, eyes closed. Divine feminine energy: warm, inviting, mystical.

Keywords: ethereal feminine silhouette, golden aura glow, purple cosmic background, sacred geometry, rose gold, divine feminine, 16:9, translucent, no visible face, cinematic lighting, 8K, cel-shaded, painterly digital.

Forbidden: dark, horror, gothic, realistic face, portrait, sexy, 3D render, Unreal, video game, church, neon, cyberpunk, cold, text.

Return ONLY raw JSON array. Keys: "fragment_id", "original_text", "image_prompt".

Cinematico.value: Cinematic, dramatic lighting, shallow depth of field, epic composition

Fotorrealista.value: Photorealistic, detailed textures, natural lighting, hyperrealistic

Arte Conceptual.value: Concept art, expressive brushstrokes, moody atmosphere, dramatic, sketch-like

Anime/Manga.value: Anime style, cel-shaded, vibrant colors, expressive characters, Studio Ghibli inspired

Animacion 3D.value: 3D animation style, Pixar-like, smooth surfaces, volumetric lighting, playful

Comic.value: Comic book style, bold outlines, halftone dots, vibrant primary colors, pop art

Acuarela.value: Watercolor painting, soft washes, paper texture, organic shapes, pastel tones

Noir.value: Film noir, high contrast, dramatic shadows, monochrome with selective color
